scope: Strict-mode --emit-ndjson regression gate (#469 Phase 3+5). Imperative driver runs feedback_parser.py against 5 fixture files: 1 canonical-clean (assert exit 0 + N>0 NDJSON + no schema_violation) + 4 broken (assert exit 1 + 1 stub line + schema_violation:true). Catches drift if a future edit reverts strict-mode emit-ndjson back to lax parse_record() (the silent-skip codepath split that #469 closed).
